S.FORM: Joe Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1928, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 9, Joe Bradley, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1987) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oe ő≤ra*lej s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *oe ő≤ra*lej, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
